name: Maximum Title Loans
description_short: LoanMax Title Loans provides fast cash loans up to $10,000 using vehicle equity as collateral, with multiple Arizona locations and same-day approval available.
description_long:
LoanMax Title Loans was founded in 1990 in Jonesboro, Georgia, and has operated for over 25 years as a vehicle title loan provider. The company operates multiple locations across Arizona, including the Mesa branch at 2926 E. Main St., and maintains a broader national footprint with licensed operations in states including Virginia, Delaware, South Carolina, New Mexico, Nevada, and Michigan. The company positions itself as helping working Americans access cash by leveraging the equity in their vehicles.

The Mesa location offers auto title loans with loan amounts up to $10,000, subject to vehicle evaluation and ability to repay. The application process requires only a vehicle, photo ID, and a clear vehicle title. LoanMax accepts multiple payment methods including cash, check, debit card, and Western Union. The Mesa location operates Monday-Tuesday and Thursday-Friday from 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM, and Wednesday from 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM. The company maintains additional nearby locations in Mesa, Chandler, Apache Junction, and Phoenix for customer convenience.

LoanMax distinguishes itself through its long operational history since 1990 and multi-state licensing compliance. The company displays regulatory disclosures for multiple states where it operates, including state license information and consumer rights documentation. They offer a toll-free application line (877-511-CASH) and online account management through their login portal. The company also provides rate schedules and consumer information brochures for regulated states, demonstrating regulatory transparency.

Title loans carry inherent risks as short-term, high-cost debt secured by vehicles. While LoanMax provides the emergency liquidity it advertises, borrowers risk vehicle repossession if unable to repay. The actual loan terms, interest rates, and fee structures are not disclosed on the provided website content, preventing complete cost analysis. Regulatory disclosures for Nevada specifically warn that title loans should be used for short-term needs only, not long-term financial solutions.
pros: Fast cash loans up to $10,000 with same-day or quick approval based on vehicle equity
Simple application requiring only vehicle, photo ID, and clear title — no credit check mentioned
Multiple payment methods accepted including cash, check, debit card, and Western Union
Multiple Arizona locations for customer convenience (Mesa, Chandler, Apache Junction, Phoenix)
Founded in 1990 with 25+ years of operational history in the title loan industry
Licensed and regulated in multiple states with published compliance disclosures
Online account management and payment options available through their website
cons: Vehicle serves as collateral and can be repossessed if loan is not repaid
Actual interest rates, fees, and loan terms are not disclosed on the website
Title loans are explicitly flagged by regulators as short-term solutions only, not long-term financial fixes
Loan approval and amounts are contingent on vehicle evaluation and ability to repay — may deny or offer less than requested
Limited hours on Wednesday (10 AM-4 PM) compared to other weekdays
best_for: Borrowers with immediate cash needs who own a vehicle with clear title and equity
Those who need funds quickly and cannot qualify for traditional bank loans or credit-based products
Arizona residents in Mesa, Chandler, Apache Junction, or Phoenix areas with convenient location access
diagnosis: LoanMax Title Loans is best for Arizona residents who own vehicles with equity and need emergency cash quickly without credit checks, but borrowers should understand that title loans are high-cost, short-term debt products where vehicle repossession is a real risk if they cannot repay. The complete cost structure including interest rates and fees should be obtained directly from the company before committing.
services: Car title loan origination and approval
In-store loan applications at physical locations
Online account login and account management
Multiple payment methods (cash, check, debit card, Western Union)
Vehicle title evaluation for loan qualification
Multi-location service network across Arizona and other states
